trace.rationale: Eligible: it navigates to singleplayer, which is the required first step to load into survival before tool gathering and tree mining.
Eligible: it advances from the world selection screen to creating a new world, which is the required next step toward loading into survival before gathering tools and mining a tree.
Eligible: it opens the World tab on the Create New World screen, which is the next required step before confirming a survival world.
Eligible: it focuses the World seed field on the Create New World screen, which is a valid next step while staying within the world-creation flow toward starting a survival world.
Eligible: it inserts the world seed into the focused field, which is the next valid step within the current world-creation flow toward starting the survival world.
Eligible: the world seed has already been inserted, and clicking Create World is the next valid step to start the survival world.
Eligible: the fresh state shows the world has loaded and the next valid survival step is to invoke resource gathering, which can lead to a wooden axe and tree mining.
